summary: Iteration 3 - Transactions Page Redesign: All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working. Dynamic filtering (type tabs, search, category chips), date-grouped list view, multi-step add modal (3 steps with recurring/split options), and glassmorphism styling all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All testID attributes present on interactive elements
✓ Backend search functionality working with query parameter (?search=Swiggy)
✓ New transaction fields (is_recurring, recurring_frequency, is_split, split_count, notes) all implemented correctly in backend
✓ Date grouping helper function working (Today, Yesterday, formatted dates)
✓ Multi-step modal (3 steps) implemented correctly with step indicators
✓ Recurring toggle shows/hides frequency chips correctly
✓ Split toggle shows/hides split count controls correctly
✓ Summary strip shows correct totals with colored dots
✓ Transaction cards display recurring and split badges
✓ Glassmorphism card styling applied (rgba backgrounds, borders)
✓ Mobile-first design with proper spacing (8pt grid visible)
✓ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Modal, ScrollView, Switch)
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created with recurring and split flags during backend testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 focused on Transactions page redesign completed successfully. All new features working: search (backend query param), category chips, type filter tabs, multi-step add modal (3 steps), recurring transactions (with frequency selection), split expenses (with count controls), date grouping (Today/Yesterday/formatted), summary strip (Income/Expense/Invested), glassmorphism styling. Transaction count updated correctly after adding new transaction (28→29). All backend and frontend tests passed.

test_categories.search: 4/4 passed - by description (Swiggy), by category (Rent), empty query, no results
test_categories.category_filter: 2/2 passed - filter by category, combined type+category
test_categories.recurring_transactions: 3/3 passed - create with frequency, without frequency, non-recurring
test_categories.split_transactions: 3/3 passed - create split, non-split, recurring+split combined
test_categories.response_fields: 1/1 passed - all new fields present in GET response

flows_tested: Header elements: title 'Transactions 28 total' (later 29), search icon, add button
Type filter tabs: All/Income/Expense/Investment - tap and verify list filters
Search functionality: tap search icon, type 'Swiggy', verify filter, clear search
Category chips: Rent, Food, Transport, Groceries - tap to filter, tap to deselect
Summary strip: Income ₹1.9L, Expense ₹80.3K, Invested ₹38.0K with colored dots
Date-grouped list: Today, Feb 10 2026, Feb 1 2026, Jan 15 2026, Jan 1 2026
Transaction cards: category icon, description, category badge, amount (colored), recurring badge (Monthly), split badge (Split ÷4, each: ₹500)
Multi-step Add Transaction modal - Step 1: type selector (Expense/Income/Investment), amount input (₹ symbol), category grid (Food selected)
Multi-step modal - Step 2: description ('Test lunch'), date (blank=today), notes (optional)
Multi-step modal - Step 3: recurring toggle ON → frequency chips appear (Monthly selected), split toggle ON → split count controls appear (+/- buttons)
Save transaction: clicked Save Transaction button, modal closed, transaction appeared in list
Verify transaction count increased from 28 to 29

transaction_endpoints./api/transactions?search=Swiggy: ✓ Working - returns filtered results by description/category/notes
transaction_endpoints./api/transactions?category=Food: ✓ Working - returns only Food category transactions
transaction_endpoints./api/transactions POST (recurring): ✓ Working - creates transaction with is_recurring=true, recurring_frequency='Monthly'
transaction_endpoints./api/transactions POST (split): ✓ Working - creates transaction with is_split=true, split_count=4

mobile_design_review.summary_strip: Compact design with colored indicator dots, proper alignment
mobile_design_review.date_grouping: Clear date headers with transaction count, proper visual hierarchy
mobile_design_review.transaction_cards: Icon + description + badges layout, recurring badge (blue), split badge (orange), proper color coding for amounts
